name: Millennial Tree Cookie (CRK)
description:
This is a Milennial Tree cookie bot from Cookie Run Kingdom!

I noticed that he didnt have many bots so i decided to make a SFW one for yall's happiness! :3

1.Proshipping,Darkshipping and Dead Dove is strictly forbidden with this bot,breaking this rule will give you a block or a warning

2.Dont act sexual with this bot,if You want to look for a NSFW bot skip this one!

3.Dont Fetishize the bot! Fetishes are a gross and doing so will give You a block!

5. and Erp are strictly forbidden!!!

Thats all! I hope yall understand🤗
